## Aba: GENERAL FUNNEL

| LOW |   |   | INTENT |   |   | HIGH |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | Prospect not aware of your business and is NOT in-market for your solution |  | Prospect is NOT aware of your business but is potentially in-market |  | Prospect NOT aware of your business but IS in-market |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  | Prospect is aware of your business but NOT in-market |  | Prospect is aware of your business and potentially in-market |  | Prospect is aware of your business and IS in-market |  |
| AWARENESS |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  | Prospect knows your business very well but is NOT in-market |  | Prospect knows your business very well and is potentially in-market |  | Prospect knows your business very well and IS in-market |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| HIGH |  |  |  |  |  |  |

| LOW |   |   | INTENT |   |   | HIGH |

|  | LAA: Engagement, Upper Funnel, 1-10%
Interests + Behaviours
Broad |  | LAA: Lower funnel (eg Purch), Engaged Shoppers
Interests |  | LAA: Lower funnel (eg Purch), Engaged Shoppers
Interests |  |

## Aba: CONTENT

|   | REASONS TO BUY (Guidance) |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| LOW | EMOTIONAL |  | INTENT |  | FUNCTIONAL |  |  | RELATIONSHIP |
|  | Why should they care?
What's the WOW or FUNCTIONALITY of the product?
Do you have TRUST or CREDIBILITY?
How are you going to create a RELATIONSHIP & RAPPORT |  |  |  | (ACTIVE BUYER)
Why should they choose your product?
Why should they act right now? |  |  | "I'm here for you" |
| EMOTIONAL |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | RAPPORT |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | "I understand you, I hear you and I'm here for you" |
|  | How can you continue building Relationship and add RAPPORT?
Can you demonstrate you understand their needs? Their problems? Their triggers?  |  |  |  |  |  |  | RELEVANCE |
| AWARENESS |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | "I know what you need" |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| FUNCTIONAL | Why should they choose your product?
What's going to motivate them to switch from passive to active buyer state?
What RELEVANCE are you showing them? |  |  |  | (ACTIVE BUYER)
Why should they act right now?
FOMO?
Scarcity? (stock/offer)
 |  |  | Relationship is built up using the Graduation Framework funneling system |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | Rapport is built up through customer research and creative testing |
| HIGH |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | Relevance is delivered through targeting the right message at the right time |

## Aba: 5W AVATAR

| WHAT | Simple description of the product |   |
| --- | --- | --- |
| WHO | A view of who your target customer is/customers are |  |
| WOW: EMOTIONAL / INTANGIBLE |  | WHY: FUNCTIONAL / PRODUCT FOCUS |
| List of benefits which cannot be measured (think, emotional feel, play on ego, state change, pains and solutions) |  | List of measurable benefits (eg shipping time, product feel, fit, comfort, money back etc) |
| WHY NOT | As many objections and reasons not to buy you can list |  |

## Aba: AD COPY

| FUNNEL | COLD / WARM / HOT / EXISTING |   | FUNNEL 2 | COLD / WARM / HOT / EXISTING |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ATTENTION | BIG BOLD STATEMENT!
Reach for their problem or opportunity
The first 2 lines matter
These lines either get the right people to view your ad, or get the wrong people to skip it |  | ATTRACTION | BIG BOLD STATEMENT!
Reach for their problem or opportunity
The first 2 lines matter
These lines either get the right people to view your ad, or get the wrong people to skip it |
| INTEREST | You’ve got them HOOKED, now keep them
Build a bridge story from Problem to Solution 
Build intrigue |  | STORY | You’ve got them HOOKED, now keep them
Build a bridge story from Problem to Solution 
Build intrigue. Build the pain up, make it raw. |
| DESIRE | Reach out to their outcomes
Improve something NOW or in FUTURE for them
Make your solution the one they MUST have
This is the new state / improvement they want |  | TRANSFORMATION | Reach out to their outcomes
Improve something NOW or in FUTURE for them
Make your solution the one they MUST have
This is the new state / improvement they want |
| ACTION | Tell them what to do next
Make it easy to identify the outcome of the action
Get them to the next step in your FUNNEL |  | ACTION | Tell them what to do next
Make it easy to identify the outcome of the action
Get them to the next step in your FUNNEL |

## Aba: Example 5W AVATAR

| WHAT | Organic Smoothies |   |
| --- | --- | --- |
| WHO | Health conscious millennials |  |
| WOW: EMOTIONAL / INTANGIBLE |  | WHY: FUNCTIONAL / PRODUCT FOCUS |
| Makes you feel more energised

Boosts your immune system

Improve memory

Supports weight-loss

Improves muscle retention and mass |  | Lasts a month with daily use

Contains Apple Cider Vinegar which improves gut health

Contains 34mg of plant Protein

100% Organic ingredients, ethically sourced in Europe

100% Vegan |
| WHY NOT | Expensive, Don’t want a subscription, it won’t work for me, I’ve never heard of this company, it’s not safe, shipping cost, where’s the proof |  |

## Aba: Example AD COPY

| Use your avatar to call out an emotional hook and throw in some functional substance depending on stage of funnel |   |
| --- | --- |
| FUNNEL | COLD |
| ATTENTION | Want to BOOST your immune system and bring back great health? |
| INTEREST | Our immune systems take a real pounding from our hectic lifestyles. 
> Not enough sleep
> Not enough nutrition
> Air pollution trapping more germs in the air
etc etc |
| DESIRE | Imagine waking up and feeling energised for the day ahead with a simple 20 second routine packed full of anti-oxidants, immune strengthening super powers and all natural ingredients designed to sustain you through the day etc etc |
| ACTION | Click below to see our latest range of natural, organic smoothies designed for the busy lifestyle. Just add water, mix and go! |
